actions.intent: Open on the visually lower side and misread which route water threatens first.
Spend another action on broad side clearing instead of the exposed route.
Chase a clean top group and let the urgent lane wait.
Continue stabilizing the board away from the priority puppy.
Commit to the wrong-order side and burn more accepted actions.
Recover dock shape instead of rescuing the exposed puppy.
Take the final non-route action before the forecast row advances.
Let water flood the exposed right-side rescue path.

notes: Verified fail: assuming the lower-looking puppy is first costs enough actions for the actually exposed route to flood.
